title: ornithogalum craibii
intro: Ornithogalum craibii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, commonly known as a type of lilyturf or a species of the ornithogalum genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum craibii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
